# Copilot Instructions

## Mission
Build and maintain a clean, minimal, and efficient workout tracking web app.

## Constraints
- Mobile-first design
- No frameworks, vanilla JS/CSS
- Static site, no backend
- Dark theme for gym use

## Coding Standards
- Use consistent CSS variables
- Prefer flexbox/grid for layouts
- Keep JS minimal and readable
- Follow mobile UX best practices

## Execution Rules
- Modify existing files instead of creating new ones unless necessary
- Keep diffs small
- Always check mobile responsiveness
- Reuse existing code patterns

## Escalation Triggers
- Adding new features beyond core tracking
- Changing the training plan structure
- Introducing external dependencies

## Escalation Protocol
Provide options and recommend the simplest one.

## De-escalation Rule
Proceed with best assumption if no response.

## Token Hygiene
Be concise. Avoid unnecessary output.

## Safety
- Do not delete critical files
- Do not introduce breaking changes without warning
